summary: The site has a good security posture, with some minor issues to address.

findings.impact: Using the latest TLS protocol version ensures the site is protected against known vulnerabilities.
findings.recommendation: Continue to use the latest TLS protocol version to maintain a high level of security.

findings.evidence: Content Security Policy (CSP) is present and configured: default-src 'self' https://static.linear.app https://static.linear.dev; ...
findings.impact: A well-configured CSP helps prevent cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks.
findings.recommendation: Review and refine the CSP configuration to ensure it is effective and up-to-date.

findings.evidence: Strict Transport Security (HSTS) is present and configured: max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains
findings.impact: HSTS helps prevent man-in-the-middle attacks by ensuring the site is only accessed over HTTPS.
findings.recommendation: Consider increasing the max-age value to a higher value, such as 31536000, to provide longer-term protection.

findings.evidence: X-Content-Type-Options is present and configured: nosniff
findings.impact: This header helps prevent MIME-sniffing attacks.
findings.recommendation: Continue to use this header to maintain protection against MIME-sniffing attacks.

findings.evidence: Referrer-Policy is present and configured: same-origin
findings.impact: This header helps control the referrer information sent with requests.
findings.recommendation: Review and refine the Referrer-Policy configuration to ensure it meets the site's needs.

findings.impact: This header helps control the features and APIs that can be used by the site.
findings.recommendation: Consider adding a Permissions-Policy header to control the features and APIs used by the site.

findings.evidence: Robots.txt contains a disallow directive for /api/
findings.impact: This directive may not be effective in preventing access to the API.
findings.recommendation: Consider using a more robust method to protect the API, such as authentication or rate limiting.

findings.evidence: Sitemap.xml contains a list of URLs, including https://linear.app/about and https://linear.app/contact
findings.impact: This information may be useful to an attacker.
findings.recommendation: Consider removing or limiting the information available in the sitemap.xml file.

findings.evidence: Certificate notAfter date is Aug 8 22:01:09 2026 GMT
findings.impact: The certificate will expire soon, which may cause issues with the site's availability.
findings.recommendation: Renew the certificate before it expires to maintain the site's availability.
